zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de Mâcon於0974年7月24日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔時，她的父親Aubry II de Mâcon39歲，母親Ermentrude de Roucy22歲。她於1000年與Hugues du Perche在法國德 艾斯特芒內結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1040年6月21日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根梅斯享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de Mâcon于0974年7月24日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔时，她的父亲Aubry II de Mâcon39岁，母亲Ermentrude de Roucy22岁。她于1000年与Hugues du Perche在法国德 艾斯特芒內结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1040年6月21日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根梅斯享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mâcon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Mason
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de Mâcon was born on 24 July 0974, in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Aubry II de Mâcon, was 39 and her mother, Ermentrude de Roucy, was 22. She married Hugues du Perche in 1000, in Marne, Grand Est, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 21 June 1040, in Metz, Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de Mâcon est née le 24 juillet 0974, à Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Aubry II de Mâcon, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude de Roucy, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues du Perche en 1000, à Marne, Grand Est, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 juin 1040, à Metz, Lorraine, Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de Mâcon am 24. Juli 0974 in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aubry II de Mâcon 39 und ihre Mutter Ermentrude de Roucy 22. Sie hat 1000 in Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich Hugues du Perche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 21. Juni 1040 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Metz, Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Mâcon è nata il il 24 luglio 0974 nel Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Aubry II de Mâcon, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Ermentrude de Roucy, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Hugues du Perche nel 1000, nel Marne, Grand Est, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 21 giugno 1040, nel Metz, Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Mâconが0974年7月24日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコンで生まれた時，父Aubry II de Mâconは39歳，母Ermentrude de Roucyは22歳であった。1000年にフランスグランド エストマルンでHugues du Percheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1040年6月21日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェンメッツで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Mâcon(이)가 0974년 7월 24일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 a콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aubry II de Mâcon(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermentrude de Roucy(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1000년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니에서 Hugues du Perche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1040년 6월 21일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 로스링 멧즈에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.24 JUL 974–21 June 1040: 0974 оны Долоодугаар сарын 24–1040 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 21

pt.24 JUL 974–21 June 1040: 24 de julho de 0974–21 de junho de 1040
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Mâcon nasceu em 24 de julho de 0974, em Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Aubry II de Mâcon, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude de Roucy, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues du Perche em 1000, em Marne, Grand Est, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 21 de junho de 1040, em Metz, Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de Mâcon родилась 24 июля 0974 г. в местности мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Aubry II de Mâcon было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude de Roucy, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues du Perche в 1000 г. в местности марн, гранд эст, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 21 июня 1040 г. в местности мец, лотринген, хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 65 лет.

es.24 JUL 974–21 June 1040: 24 de julio de 0974–21 de junio de 1040
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de Mâcon nació el 24 de julio de 0974, en Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Aubry II de Mâcon, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ermentrude de Roucy, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hugues du Perche en 1000, en Marne, Grand Est, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 21 de junio de 1040, en Metz, Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, a la edad de 65 años.
